info.title: Zengine REST API
info.description: Zengine is a platform for managing data through workspaces, forms, records, tasks, events, notes, files, and more. The REST API enables integration with other apps such as email systems, marketing automation systems, or EMRs. All API communications require HTTPS. Each access token is allowed 250 queries per 5 minute window.

get.description: Retrieve a list of users that belong to the same workspaces as you.
Retrieve a specific user by ID.
View clients authorized to access a user's Zengine account.

delete.description: Revoke access for an authorized client.

get.description: List API clients (applications) for a user.

post.description: Upload an avatar image. The image is cropped and shrunk proportionally to 40x40 pixels.

get.description: Retrieve task display preferences for a user.
Retrieve notifications for a user about subscribed resources.

put.description: Change how often notification emails are received.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all workspaces you are a member of.
Retrieve roles for a workspace. Standard roles: Owner, Administrator, Editor, Full Member.

post.summary: Invite a user to a workspace
post.description: Invite a user to a workspace
Accept an invitation by passing the invite code.

get.description: Retrieve workspace-specific task display preferences for a member.

post.description: Upload a workspace logo image. Image should be less than 200px wide and less than 10000px high.
Copy a workspace including forms, task lists, email templates, data filters, views, and workflow triggers.

get.description: Retrieve all forms associated with workspaces you have access to.

post.summary: Add a form to a workspace
post.description: Add a form to a workspace

get.description: Retrieve a list of all your forms.

slug.description: Unique slug for public form access.

isPublic.description: Whether the form is publicly accessible (deprecated).

get.description: Retrieve fields for a form including text inputs, dropdowns, checkboxes, linked fields, member fields, calculated fields, and numeric fields.
Retrieve records for a form with filtering, sorting, and pagination.

parameters.name: dataView.id
parameters.description: Apply a saved data view filter.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: JSON filter object for record filtering.

folder.id.description: Folder to place the record in.

isComplete.description: Whether the record is a draft or complete.

validate.description: Whether to run validation on the record.

get.description: Retrieve record-level permissions for a specific form.
Retrieve default record-level permissions that apply to all forms without form-specific permissions.
Retrieve form-level read permissions defining which roles can access forms.

post.summary: Upload a file to a form field
post.description: Upload a file to a field of type file-upload.

get.description: Retrieve applicable form field parameters for each field type.
Retrieve default messages for form terminology use cases (validation errors, submission instructions, success messages).

post.description: Import records from a CSV file into a form.
Upload a CSV file for record import. Returns a file ID and hash for use with record import jobs.

get.description: View subscriptions to workspaces, records, events, tasks, and notes.

post.description: Add a note about a task, event, or file.

get.description: Retrieve activity logs generated when workspaces, records, tasks, events, files, notes, members, or invitees are created, updated, or deleted.

post.description: Save settings for performing calculations on records including filtering, aggregations (count, sum, average, valueOf), and groupings.
Execute calculations on form records using either a saved calculation setting ID or inline filter, aggregations, groupings, and timezone parameters.
Generate binary files (PDFs) from HTML templates using Handlebars.js. Supports page orientation, page numbers, and custom formatting.
Upload a zip file of plugin frontend code containing a plugin.json at the top level.

get.description: Retrieve server-side services for a plugin.

post.description: Create a server-side Node.js service for a plugin.

put.description: To delete a service, set pendingDeletion to true. The service is deleted when the plugin is published.

post.description: Upload draft code for a plugin service. Published version is updated when the parent plugin is published.

post.summary: Link a plugin to a workspace
post.description: Link a plugin to a workspace

get.description: View logged webhook delivery attempts including request and response details.

post.description: Install a marketplace app template into your account.

get.description: Retrieve country ID to name mappings for country-select form fields.
Retrieve state ID to name mappings for state-select form fields.
Retrieve currency information for numeric field formatting.

oauth2.description: OAuth 2.0 authentication. Zengine uses a 3-legged OAuth 2 flow.

accessToken.name: access_token
accessToken.description: Access token passed as a query parameter.

sort.name: sort
sort.description: Sort field and direction (prefix with '-' for descending).

attributes.name: attributes
attributes.description: Comma-separated list of attributes to include in the response.

related.name: related
related.description: Comma-separated list of related resources to include.

captcha.description: Enable captcha for public form submissions (deprecated).

returnUrl.description: Redirect URL after public form submission (deprecated).

pendingRecordFolderId.description: Folder for records with pending payment.

terminology.description: Template text for form buttons, labels, success and error messages.

recordName.description: Field ID that determines the record name.
